query_text: repo search flow-intent-inference technical-market-pricing-context overlay-routing options positioning
notes: Existing Mira methods either record options snapshot fields or infer broad visible-flow intent. A large structured options-flow dataset justifies a specialist framework with data-quality gates and validation slices.

query_text: OCC options volume open interest query
notes: OCC source supports official options data context. Framework still needs raw user dataset provenance and field-level audit before conclusions can exceed exploratory. https://www.theocc.com/market-data/market-data-reports/volume-and-open-interest/volume-query

query_text: Pan Poteshman information option volume future stock prices
notes: Supports possibility that buyer-initiated opening option volume contains information, but key labels are not always public. This motivates opening-flow confidence and lookahead-bias controls. https://www.nber.org/papers/w10925

query_text: options earnings announcements volume open interest liquidity
notes: Options volume OI IV and spreads change around earnings; use as event-window design support, not directional proof. https://ideas.repec.org/a/bla/eufman/v6y2000i2p149-171.html

query_text: options volume as noise earnings announcements retail zero commission
notes: Contradiction seed highlights retail/noise and regime risks. Use to require false-positive validation before adoption. https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/Delivery.cfm/6448100.pdf?abstractid=6448100&mirid=1
